controls.details: Verify the internal audit charter is approved by the board and grants unrestricted access.
controls.acceptance: Signed charter on file, dated within 2 years, no management reporting line for CAE.

controls.details: Obtain and review the last two cycles of audit reports for repeat findings.
controls.acceptance: At least 2 prior reports obtained; repeat findings identified and tracked.

controls.details: Full export of all user accounts including service accounts, their roles, and last login date.
controls.acceptance: Complete list exported within 5 business days of request; includes all active and disabled accounts.

controls.details: Report showing MFA enrolment status for all user accounts.
controls.acceptance: 100% of privileged accounts and 95%+ of standard accounts enrolled in MFA.

controls.details: List of all accounts with admin, root, or elevated privileges including service accounts.
controls.acceptance: All privileged accounts documented with business justification and named owner.

controls.details: Current approved information security policy document.
controls.acceptance: Policy approved by management, reviewed within the last 12 months, version controlled.

controls.details: Current risk register showing identified risks, ratings, owners, and treatment plans.
controls.acceptance: Updated within last quarter, all High/Critical risks have treatment plans and owners.

controls.details: Evidence that centralised logging is enabled for all in-scope systems.
controls.acceptance: All systems logging to SIEM/central store; retention >= 12 months.

controls.details: Documentation of active monitoring alert rules and thresholds.
controls.acceptance: Alert rules documented, reviewed within 6 months, mapped to threat scenarios.

controls.details: Full export of all firewall ACL rules including source, destination, port, and action.
controls.acceptance: Complete rule set provided; last review date confirmed within 6 months.

controls.details: Current network architecture diagram showing zones, segments, and trust boundaries.
controls.acceptance: Diagram current within 12 months, shows DMZ, internal, management, and external zones.

controls.details: Latest vulnerability scan results for all in-scope applications and infrastructure.
controls.acceptance: Scan completed within 90 days; all Critical/High findings have remediation tickets.
